name: 深情求婚
description: Noah在頒獎典禮上當眾求婚，與Richard跪地求復合形成鮮明對比。守護八年的深情終於得到回報，觀眾的浪漫期待被滿足。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: Michelle, I want to protect you for the rest of my life. Will you marry me? ... Richard: Michelle, please. I know I screwed up. Give me another chance. Let's get remarried. ... Noah: Really? Now that you find out that she's the heir to Barclay and M, you want to marry her? He's pathetic.
